message:
test(mcp): expand from 32 to 88 tests for MCP server utilities

Cover apply_tail_truncation (under/exact/over limit, empty, single line),
parse_cass_agent (all known agents, case insensitivity, whitespace, unknown),
parse_caut_service, check_refresh_cooldown (no prior, within, past, boundary),
resolve_alt_screen_state (unknown, cursor priority, fallback, no status),
policy_reason/approval_command for all PolicyDecision variants,
injection_from_decision Allow/Deny/RequireApproval mapping,
default_* serde functions, now_ms/elapsed_ms, McpOutputFormat default/eq,
extract_mcp_output_format edge cases (invalid/non-string/non-object),
encode_mcp_contents json passthrough and toon error,
envelope_to_content success/error, augment_tool_schema edge cases,
McpEnvelope serde roundtrips, map_mcp_error wezterm variant,
parse_mcp_output_format empty/case-insensitive.

wa-1u90p.7.1 Batch 14

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
